parameters.query: SELECT inbox_item_id::text AS inbox_item_id FROM inbox.knowledge_items WHERE is_archived = false ORDER BY created_at;
SELECT coalesce(nullif($1::text, '')::uuid, (SELECT inbox_item_id FROM inbox.knowledge_items WHERE is_archived = false ORDER BY updated_at DESC LIMIT 1))::text AS inbox_item_id;

WITH target AS (
  SELECT knowledge.*, project.name AS project, category.name AS category, item_type.name AS item_type,
    coalesce(tags.names, '[]'::jsonb) AS tags, attachment.checksums
  FROM inbox.knowledge_items knowledge
  LEFT JOIN inbox.projects project ON project.id = knowledge.project_id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.categories category ON category.id = knowledge.category_id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.item_types item_type ON item_type.id = knowledge.item_type_id
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT jsonb_agg(tag.normalized_name ORDER BY tag.normalized_name) AS names
    FROM inbox.knowledge_item_tags link JOIN inbox.tags tag ON tag.id = link.tag_id
    WHERE link.knowledge_item_id = knowledge.id
  ) tags ON true
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT array_agg(DISTINCT checksum_sha256) FILTER (WHERE checksum_sha256 IS NOT NULL) AS checksums
    FROM inbox.attachments WHERE inbox_item_id = knowledge.inbox_item_id
  ) attachment ON true
  WHERE knowledge.inbox_item_id = $1::uuid AND knowledge.is_archived = false
), scored AS (
  SELECT candidate.id, candidate.inbox_item_id, candidate.title, candidate.summary,
    project.name AS project, category.name AS category, item_type.name AS item_type,
    coalesce(candidate_tags.names, '[]'::jsonb) AS tags,
    shared_tags.count AS shared_tag_count,
    CASE
      WHEN target.checksums IS NOT NULL AND candidate_attachment.checksums IS NOT NULL AND target.checksums && candidate_attachment.checksums THEN 'duplicate'
      WHEN target.source_url IS NOT NULL AND candidate.source_url = target.source_url THEN 'duplicate'
      WHEN candidate.source_url IS NOT NULL AND position(lower(candidate.source_url) IN lower(target.content)) > 0 THEN 'references'
      WHEN target.source_url IS NOT NULL AND position(lower(target.source_url) IN lower(candidate.content)) > 0 THEN 'references'
      ELSE NULL
    END AS hard_relation,
    CASE
      WHEN candidate.source_url IS NOT NULL AND position(lower(candidate.source_url) IN lower(target.content)) > 0 THEN 'target_to_candidate'
      WHEN target.source_url IS NOT NULL AND position(lower(target.source_url) IN lower(candidate.content)) > 0 THEN 'candidate_to_target'
      ELSE 'target_to_candidate'
    END AS reference_direction,
    least(1.0,
      (CASE WHEN candidate.project_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM target.project_id AND target.project_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0.30 ELSE 0 END)
      + (CASE WHEN candidate.category_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM target.category_id AND target.category_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0.30 ELSE 0 END)
      + (CASE WHEN candidate.item_type_id IS NOT DISTINCT FROM target.item_type_id AND target.item_type_id IS NOT NULL THEN 0.10 ELSE 0 END)
      + least(coalesce(shared_tags.count, 0) * 0.10, 0.30)
      + (CASE WHEN target.checksums IS NOT NULL AND candidate_attachment.checksums IS NOT NULL AND target.checksums && candidate_attachment.checksums THEN 0.70 ELSE 0 END)
      + (CASE WHEN target.source_url IS NOT NULL AND candidate.source_url = target.source_url THEN 0.70 ELSE 0 END)
    ) AS heuristic_score,
    candidate.created_at
  FROM target
  JOIN inbox.knowledge_items candidate ON candidate.user_id = target.user_id AND candidate.id <> target.id AND candidate.is_archived = false
  LEFT JOIN inbox.projects project ON project.id = candidate.project_id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.categories category ON category.id = candidate.category_id
  LEFT JOIN inbox.item_types item_type ON item_type.id = candidate.item_type_id
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT jsonb_agg(tag.normalized_name ORDER BY tag.normalized_name) AS names
    FROM inbox.knowledge_item_tags link JOIN inbox.tags tag ON tag.id = link.tag_id
    WHERE link.knowledge_item_id = candidate.id
  ) candidate_tags ON true
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT count(*)::integer AS count
    FROM inbox.knowledge_item_tags target_tag
    JOIN inbox.knowledge_item_tags candidate_tag ON candidate_tag.tag_id = target_tag.tag_id
    WHERE target_tag.knowledge_item_id = target.id AND candidate_tag.knowledge_item_id = candidate.id
  ) shared_tags ON true
  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT array_agg(DISTINCT checksum_sha256) FILTER (WHERE checksum_sha256 IS NOT NULL) AS checksums
    FROM inbox.attachments WHERE inbox_item_id = candidate.inbox_item_id
  ) candidate_attachment ON true
), candidates AS (
  SELECT * FROM scored
  WHERE hard_relation IS NOT NULL OR heuristic_score >= 0.25
  ORDER BY (hard_relation IS NOT NULL) DESC, heuristic_score DESC, created_at DESC
  LIMIT 8
)
SELECT
  target.id::text AS target_knowledge_id, target.inbox_item_id::text AS target_inbox_item_id,
  jsonb_build_object('id', target.id::text, 'title', target.title, 'summary', target.summary, 'project', target.project, 'category', target.category, 'item_type', target.item_type, 'tags', target.tags) AS target,
  coalesce((SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
    'id', candidates.id::text, 'inbox_item_id', candidates.inbox_item_id::text, 'title', candidates.title, 'summary', candidates.summary,
    'project', candidates.project, 'category', candidates.category, 'item_type', candidates.item_type, 'tags', candidates.tags,
    'shared_tag_count', candidates.shared_tag_count, 'hard_relation', candidates.hard_relation,
    'reference_direction', candidates.reference_direction, 'heuristic_score', candidates.heuristic_score
  ) ORDER BY (candidates.hard_relation IS NOT NULL) DESC, candidates.heuristic_score DESC) FROM candidates), '[]'::jsonb) AS candidates
FROM target;

WITH removed AS (
  DELETE FROM inbox.relations
  WHERE created_by = 'ai' AND (source_item_id = $1::uuid OR target_item_id = $1::uuid)
  RETURNING id
), incoming AS (
  SELECT * FROM jsonb_to_recordset($2::jsonb) AS relation(
    source_item_id uuid, target_item_id uuid, relation_type text, score numeric, explanation text
  )
), inserted AS (
  INSERT INTO inbox.relations (source_item_id, target_item_id, relation_type, score, explanation, created_by)
  SELECT source_item_id, target_item_id, relation_type, score, explanation, 'ai'
  FROM incoming CROSS JOIN (SELECT count(*) FROM removed) cleanup
  WHERE source_item_id <> target_item_id
  ON CONFLICT (source_item_id, target_item_id, relation_type) DO UPDATE SET
    score = EXCLUDED.score, explanation = EXCLUDED.explanation, created_by = 'ai'
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT $1::uuid::text AS target_knowledge_id, $3::uuid::text AS target_inbox_item_id,
  (SELECT count(*) FROM removed) AS removed_count, (SELECT count(*) FROM inserted) AS relation_count;
